name: GoGold Resources Inc.
description: GoGold Resources Inc. is a Canadian silver-gold producer with projects in Mexico, including the producing Los Ricos South mine and developing Los Ricos North project in Jalisco State. The company reported revenue of $72.5 million in fiscal 2025, representing 98.6% year-over-year growth, and also operates the Parral Tailings silver project in Chihuahua, Mexico.
